creator: freebsd@moosefs.com
text:
Created attachment 175282
Update to the newest MooseFS 2 stable version (2.0.91-1)

This is a small change and passes QA (portlint, poudriere).


Recent changes since MooseFS 2.0.89:

* MooseFS 2.0.91-1 (2016-09-28)

  - (mount) fixed using connection cache in readdata module

* MooseFS 2.0.90-1 (2016-08-18)

  - (cli) fixed displaying quota info in plain mode
  - (mount) fixed code to silence some compiler warnings
